description: Textured leather monk strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. For the debonair who pushes the sartorial envelope or sticks to classic styling as per his mood. Style this piece with flat front trousers, a tonal blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Textured leather upper with reinforced overlay on the forefoot and heel Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Strap across the midfoot with a mock tang clasp Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
